---
title: "00: Load & Validate Preprocessed Data"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)
source(here::here("analysis", "config.R"))
```

# Load Data

```{r load-data}
games <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "games.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
players <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "players.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
trials <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "trials.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
messages <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "messages.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
speaker_utts <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, utterances_file), show_col_types = FALSE)
social_guesses <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "social_guesses.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# Game-Level Summary

```{r game-summary}
games %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n_games = n(),
    mean_players = mean(numPlayers, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_p1_blocks = mean(phase1Blocks, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_p2_blocks = mean(phase2Blocks, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Games per condition")
```

# Player-Level Summary

```{r player-summary}
players %>%
  group_by(gameId) %>%
  summarise(
    n_players = n(),
    n_active = sum(isActive == TRUE | isActive == "true", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_inactive = sum(isActive == FALSE | isActive == "false", na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_score = mean(as.numeric(score), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_bonus = mean(as.numeric(bonus), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Players per game")
```

```{r player-demographics}
# Summarize exit survey demographics if available
demo_cols <- names(players)[str_detect(names(players), "^exitSurvey_")]
if (length(demo_cols) > 0) {
  cat("Exit survey fields:", paste(demo_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")

  if ("exitSurvey_gender" %in% names(players)) {
    players %>%
      count(exitSurvey_gender) %>%
      knitr::kable(caption = "Gender distribution")
  }

  if ("exitSurvey_education" %in% names(players)) {
    players %>%
      count(exitSurvey_education) %>%
      knitr::kable(caption = "Education distribution")
  }
}
```

# Trial-Level Summary

```{r trial-summary}
cat("Total trial rows:", nrow(trials), "\n")
cat("Unique games:", n_distinct(trials$gameId), "\n")
cat("Unique players:", n_distinct(trials$playerId), "\n")

trials %>%
  filter(role == "listener") %>%
  group_by(phaseNum) %>%
  summarise(
    n_trials = n(),
    accuracy = mean(clickedCorrect == TRUE | clickedCorrect == "true", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Listener accuracy by phase")
```

# Message Summary

```{r message-summary}
cat("Total messages:", nrow(messages), "\n")
cat("Speaker messages:", sum(messages$senderRole == "speaker", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Listener messages:", sum(messages$senderRole == "listener", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

messages %>%
  mutate(wordCount = str_count(text, "\\S+")) %>%
  group_by(senderRole) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_words = mean(wordCount, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_words = median(wordCount, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Message statistics by role")
```

# Speaker Utterance Summary

```{r utterance-summary}
cat("Total speaker utterances:", nrow(speaker_utts), "\n")

speaker_utts %>%
  group_by(phase, phaseNum) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_length = mean(uttLength, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_length = sd(uttLength, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Speaker utterance length by phase")
```

# Social Guesses Summary

```{r social-guess-summary}
if (nrow(social_guesses) > 0) {
  cat("Total social guesses:", nrow(social_guesses), "\n")
  cat("Overall accuracy:",
      mean(social_guesses$socialGuessCorrect == TRUE |
           social_guesses$socialGuessCorrect == "true", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No social guess data (expected for refer_separated and refer_mixed conditions)\n")
}
```

# Exclusion Criteria Checks

```{r exclusion-checks}
# Groups where <2/3 participants achieved <2/3 accuracy in last 3 blocks of Phase 1
listener_trials <- trials %>%
  filter(role == "listener", phaseNum == 1)

# Get phase1Blocks per game
game_p1 <- games %>% select(gameId, phase1Blocks)

listener_accuracy <- listener_trials %>%
  left_join(game_p1, by = "gameId") %>%
  filter(blockNum >= phase1Blocks - 3) %>%
  group_by(gameId, playerId, originalGroup) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(clickedCorrect == TRUE | clickedCorrect == "true", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Flag players below 2/3 accuracy
listener_accuracy <- listener_accuracy %>%
  mutate(meets_threshold = accuracy >= 2/3)

# Check groups
group_accuracy <- listener_accuracy %>%
  group_by(gameId, originalGroup) %>%
  summarise(
    n_players = n(),
    n_meeting_threshold = sum(meets_threshold),
    prop_meeting = n_meeting_threshold / n_players,
    group_meets = prop_meeting >= 2/3,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nGroup accuracy check (last 3 blocks Phase 1):\n")
group_accuracy %>%
  knitr::kable()

excluded_groups <- group_accuracy %>% filter(!group_meets)
if (nrow(excluded_groups) > 0) {
  cat("\nGroups flagged for exclusion:\n")
  print(excluded_groups)
} else {
  cat("\nNo groups flagged for exclusion.\n")
}
```
